headline: Pentagon Taps Boeing, Lockheed To Triple Critical Missile Output
summary: Lockheed Martin Corp. shares moved higher on Wednesday after announcing a major defense production framework with the U.S. Defense Department. The Pentagon has outlined a long-term plan to ramp up Patriot Advanced Capability-3 (PAC-3) missile supply-chain capacity. The multi-year framework highlights increasing demand for defense technologies amid evolving geopolitical risks. Details The Department said it reached a "landmark framework agreement" with Boeing Company and Lockheed Martin to triple
